# DisciplineOS

> AI-powered daily discipline and productivity tracker — schedules, habits, goals, analytics, and an AI coach to help you build consistent routines.

DisciplineOS helps users plan daily routines, track habits, measure focus time and discipline scores, and receive AI-generated coaching from their actual performance data.

## Pages

- [Sign in / Sign up](/auth): Email or Google authentication to access DisciplineOS.

## Optional

- [Reset password](/reset-password): Password recovery flow.
